Step: STAGE 1.1.1: ASSESSING APPLICABLE AGENC(IES) FOR PROSPECTIVE CASE
Contact Dyson with a business enquiry.
Request information (Type of intended business, Address, Proposed floorplan, Copies of any approval of use).

If yes client sent AoU, proceed to Assess if Quotation is Needed.

If no enquiry made, Inform client to email HDB/JTC and send over list of requirements for use.

If yes it falls under existing Approval of Use, proceed to Assess if Quotation is Needed.
If no it does not fall under existing Approval of Use, Conduct checks on URA Portal / Email officer handling specific area of unit to verify if Change of Use to client's desired use is allowed.
Is Change of Use to desired use allowed?
If no Change of Use is not allowed, Inform client of potential issues regarding Approval of Use for desired business (DO NOT TAKE ON THE CASE).
If yes Change of Use is allowed, proceed to Assess if Quotation is Needed.
